headline: KFC® Expands $10 Tuesday into a Weekday Bucket Lineup, Introduces Two New Sauces
summary: As spring turns into summer, KFC is evolving its fan-favorite $10 Tuesday deal into a new weekday "Bucket of the Day," * bringing a $10 bucket to customers each weekday, starting now.

headline: Dividend Income Update Q2, Q3, Q4 2025
summary: The market may move up and down irrationally and seemingly on a whim, while our dividends remain much more stable, reliable and predictable. Read more here.
